case_title: JANE ROCIO EVANS VS. FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, JANE ROCIO MA, MFT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/30/12 TO PLAINTIFF JANE ROCIO EVANS, "UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
